whyUs.title: Why travel with us
whyUs.subtitle: We are a small travel agency based directly in Indonesia. We offer what big agencies can't.
whyUs.localKnowledgeDesc: We are based in Indonesia and know every corner of the islands. No middlemen.
whyUs.smallGroupsDesc: Maximum 8–10 people per group. Personal approach and flexible itinerary.
whyUs.authenticDesc: Off the beaten path. Local food, culture, and nature as the locals know it.
whyUs.czechDesc: Communication in Czech, Czech-speaking guide on site. No language barrier.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: From choosing a package to an unforgettable experience in 3 simple steps.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Browse our curated travel packages and pick the one that excites you the most.
howItWorks.step2Desc: We'll get back to you within 24 hours. We'll finalize the dates, group size, and any special wishes.
howItWorks.step3Desc: A Czech-speaking guide will welcome you on site and we'll take care of everything from day one to the last.

testimonials.title: What our travelers say
testimonials.subtitle: Read the experiences of people who have already traveled with us through Indonesia.

items.name: Tomáš Novák
items.text: An absolutely exceptional experience. Martin took us to places ordinary tourists never reach. The small group was perfect – no waiting around, we could move at our own pace. I’ll definitely be back for Java!

items.name: Petra Horáčková
items.text: Sunrise over Bromo was the most beautiful thing I’ve ever seen. Flawless organisation, a wonderful guide, and lovely accommodation. Exactly how I imagined travelling without unnecessary stress.

items.name: Jakub & Lucie Svobodovi
items.text: We went as a couple for our anniversary trip and couldn’t have chosen better. The Rinjani trek was physically demanding, but our guide kept us brilliantly motivated. The view from the summit is unforgettable. Thank you, Nusantara!

aboutUs.metaDesc: Discover what drives us and why we fell in love with Indonesia. Small groups, authentic experiences, Czech-speaking guide living on the ground.
aboutUs.heroSubtitle: We believe real travel starts where the tourist brochures end. We're a small agency with a big heart – and Indonesia is our home.
aboutUs.p1Text: Maximum 8 people per group. Not because we can't take more, but because we believe this number separates tourists from real travellers. A second car, a second guide, a second restaurant – that's no longer authentic.
aboutUs.p2Text: Our guides don't live in Prague. They live in Java, Bali, Flores. They know the locals, respect local culture and speak Indonesian. We don't give you a coordinator from a map – we give you someone who truly lives there.
aboutUs.p3Text: One island thoroughly, not ten islands superficially. Take enough time in one place so you leave with more than just photos. Indonesia rewards those who don't stop only at popular spots.
aboutUs.p4Text: We don't stay in resort hotels unless necessary. We prefer family guesthouses, warung restaurants and roads through villages – not highways around them.
aboutUs.w1Text: Each one different. From volcanoes and ancient rainforests to the world-class underwater world of Raja Ampat.
aboutUs.w2Text: Hindu Bali, Muslim Java, animist Flores – three worlds on one archipelago.
aboutUs.w3Text: Komodo, Bromo, Borobudur. Places that stay in your memory longer than an Instagram feed.
aboutUs.w4Text: One of the richest cuisines in the world – and almost unknown in Central Europe. Rendang, nasi goreng, soto ayam.
aboutUs.w5Text: Deep experience at comparable prices to Thailand or Bali all-inclusive – but without the crowds.
aboutUs.w6Text: Indonesia still attracts a fraction of the tourists you might expect. No overcrowded beaches full of Europeans, no queues at Instagram spots – just places as they really are.
aboutUs.ctaText: Get in touch. Together we'll plan your dream trip – no commitment, no charge.
